programs.title: PAW Patrol
programs.sub_title: Pups Save Hummy Mummy's New Home; Pups Save Adventure Bakes
programs.desc: A pair of alligators take Mayor Humdinger's mother, Helga Humdinger, on a wild ride across Foggy Bottom!; Winnie Winnington is determined to beat Mayor Goodway and Chickaletta in a cooking competition to find Adventure Bay's best bakers.

programs.title: Rubble & Crew
programs.sub_title: The Crew Builds a Sporting Goods Store; The Crew Plays Construction Vehicle Soccer
programs.desc: Rubble moves with his family of construction pups to the nearby town of Builder Cove where they live, play, and build whatever the community needs.

programs.title: Mr. Crocodile
programs.desc: Mr. Crocodile and his best friend Daisy cheerfully navigate life with boundless enthusiasm and comical misunderstandings due to his instinctive crocodile logic.

programs.title: PAW Patrol
programs.sub_title: Mission PAW: Pups Save a Royal Concert; Mission PAW: Pups Save the Princess' Pals
programs.desc: Luke Stars goes missing before his Royal Concert in Barkingburg and Sweetie attempts to take over the event; animals overrun Barkingburg Castle while the Princess is away, forcing Ryder and the "PAW Patrol" to get them under control.

programs.title: PAW Patrol
programs.sub_title: Pups Save Helga and the Humsquatch; Pups Save the Missing Bone-Stone
programs.desc: While Humdinger gets dressed for a day with his Hummy Mummy, the Humsquatch accidentally puts on the mayor's suit and takes his place; when a precious bone goes missing, the Pups' only chance at getting it back is to team up with Sweetie.

programs.title: Rubble & Crew
programs.sub_title: The Crew Builds a Sporting Goods Store; The Crew Plays Construction Vehicle Soccer
programs.desc: Rubble moves with his family of construction pups to the nearby town of Builder Cove where they live, play, and build whatever the community needs.
